# Blitz Community

Official forums: [EU](http://forum.wotblitz.eu/) [NA](http://forum.wotblitz.com/) [ASIA](http://forum.wotblitz.asia/) & [RU](http://forum.wotblitz.ru/). The official forums have some great guides available if you're willing to do some reading and searching. Also general game discussion.

[Blitz on Reddit](https://www.reddit.com/r/WorldOfTanksBlitz/) The subreddit has a lot memes and the like, if that's your kinda thing. Also the occasional useful post 😉

[WoT Inspector](http://www.wotinspector.com/) Some of the best software available to accompany your Blitz playing. Armour Inspector for viewing tank models, Map Inspector for ... viewing maps. Also replay parsing (which BlitzStars gratefully uses for the Hall of Fame), and an extensive replay library.

[Blitz Economics - Premium/Collector Tank Tracker](http://forum.wotblitz.eu/index.php?/topic/52852-blitz-economics-premiumcollector-tank-tracker/) Absurdly detailed work by [stubbo66](https://www.blitzstars.com/player/eu/stubbo66) in keeping track of all the premium offers, past and present, and their relative values.

[BlitzAnalysiz.com](https://blitzanalysiz.com/) \- Site by perhaps the biggest stats nerd out there, [Jylpah](https://www.blitzstars.com/player/eu/jylpah). BlitzAnalysiz takes a deep dive in to statistical analysis of the game, on a patch by patch basis.

[History of Tank Balance Changes](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/17CXsRjguuTiJVXgWHN6o3CMbN2lJbngVhVBvxK-21D4/edit?usp=sharing) \- A spreadsheet allowing you to see changes made to various tanks over time in a concise way. Useful work by [tankeatingtiger](https://www.blitzstars.com/player/com/tankeatingtiger).

[WoTB Community Hub reloaded](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.caf4u.wotbcommunityhub)\[android Play Store link\] - _"The purpose of the App is to provide the WoTB Community with an application to find all the interesting bits and pieces about and around WoT Blitz in one handy (hi Germans), mobile (hi English speaking world) application."_ App by [HiDeathinition](https://www.blitzstars.com/player/eu/HiDeathinition).
